# La-Z-Boy Columbus

> La-Z-Boy Columbus is a family-owned La-Z-Boy Furniture Gallery franchise in Columbus, Georgia, offering quality recliners, sofas, sectionals, and custom furniture with personalized in-store and in-home design consultations. Serving the Chattahoochee Valley since 2002.

## What We Do
- Recliners and motion furniture
- Custom upholstered sofas and sectionals
- In-home and in-store design consultations
- Custom fabric and configuration options on all furniture
- Power lift recliners and accessibility furniture
- Sleep sofas and accent furniture

## Who We Serve
- Homeowners in Columbus, Georgia and surrounding communities
- Customers in Phenix City, Fortson, Midland, Auburn, Opelika, and the Chattahoochee Valley
- Customers looking for quality, customizable, Made-in-America furniture

## Contact
- Website: https://lzbcolumbus.com
- Email: info@lazboy-columbus.com
- Phone: (706) 653-1070
- Address: 5555 Whittlesey Blvd, Bldg 1, Columbus, GA 31909

## Hours
- Monday–Saturday: 10:00 AM – 7:00 PM
- Sunday: 12:30 PM – 5:00 PM
